findings.description: Source has a distinct top-level section 'SQLログの出力例' (delimited with `===`) that is separate from 'SqlPStatement#executeBatchメソッドの更新終了時'. The knowledge file merges both into s6 without a separate index entry. The s6 index title remains 'SqlPStatement#executeBatchメソッドの更新終了時', so an AI navigating by index title would not recognize that s6 also contains the SQLログの出力例 content. The extra hints (log.properties, app-log.properties, sqlLogFormatter, SQLログ出力例) partially compensate, but the section title is misleading for the merged content.
findings.source_evidence: Source has two distinct sections: 'SqlPStatement#executeBatchメソッドの更新終了時' (------) and 'SQLログの出力例' (===). Knowledge file index has only s1–s6 with s6 titled 'SqlPStatement#executeBatchメソッドの更新終了時', absorbing the entire SQLログの出力例 section into s6's body.
